title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!
